scripts.dev: pnpm run dev:api & pnpm run dev:web
scripts.bundle: pnpm build:web && rm -rf fastify-admin/ui && cp -r web/dist fastify-admin/ui && pnpm build:package
scripts.release: pnpm bundle && pnpm --filter fastify-admin publish --access public
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter fastify-admin lint && pnpm --filter web lint
scripts.format: pnpm --filter fastify-admin format && pnpm --filter web format
